ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Cocoa powder, no added sugars, powder, instant
Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added
Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: Caramel 49% (Glucose Syrup, Sugar, Sweetened Condensed Milk, Invert Sugar Syrup, Paim Kernel Oil, Flavouring, Emulsifier Soya Lecithin (E322)), Chocolate Flavour Coating 22% (Sugar, Blend of Palm and Palm Kernel Oil, Skimmed Milk Powder, Whey Powder (from Milk), Fat Reduced Cocoa Powder, Emulsifier Soya Lecithin (E322), Salt, Vanillin), Roasted Coconut 17% (Desiccated Coconut (I1%), Rusk (from Wheat)),Wafer 12% (Fortified Wheat Flour (Wheat Flour, Calcium Carbonate, Iron, Niacin, Thiamin), Sugar, Coconut Oil, Raising Agent (Sodium Bicarbonate), Salt, Emulsifier Soya Lecithin (E322)).
